name: Beijing 2022
description: The XXIV Winter Olympic Games will be held from February 4 to 20, 2022 in Beijing. 2,892 athletes will take part in competitions in 7 sports and 24 disciplines, where 109 sets of medals will be awarded. The Games program includes 7 new disciplines. Beijing will become the first city to host both the Summer and Winter Games. The Games motto is "Together for a Shared Future".

name: FREE. UNBROKEN. UNCONQUERED
description: 300 years of dreams of statehood; 105 years of struggle for a free Ukraine; 31 years of building independence; 8 years of defending sovereignty and borders. On February 24, 2022, Russia began a new stage of the eight-year war against Ukraine - a full-scale offensive that has already lasted 6 months. Unexpectedly, the invaders encountered enormous resistance from Ukrainians. Thanks to the resistance of the Armed Forces of Ukraine and self-defense forces, the Russian army suffers huge losses in manpower and equipment every day. And although the enemy launches massive missile and bomb strikes on peaceful Ukrainian cities and villages every day, committing genocide against the Ukrainian people, the nation remains unconquered. In the struggle for freedom, Ukrainians show incredible heroism, patriotism, resilience, and love for their homeland, each in their place, contributing their crucial input to Victory. With the postal issue "FREE. UNBROKEN. UNCONQUERED" we honor Ukrainians who have become true heroes for the whole world!
